# Whiskora

Whiskora is a pet-care web platform for pet owners, breeders, farms, and pet-service partners.

Official website: https://whiskora.pet
Primary Thai homepage: https://whiskora.pet/th

Core offering:
- Free Pet ID and QR Profile for each pet.
- Pet health records including vaccines, deworming, checkups, and notes.
- Pedigree and parent-line records for responsible breeders and farms.
- Document storage for vaccine books, pedigree certificates, and health certificates.
- Farm directory for registered pet farms with clearer profiles and review-ready information.
- Verified profile levels for pets and breeders.

Important public pages:
- Homepage: https://whiskora.pet/th
- Pet ID and QR Profile: https://whiskora.pet/th/pet-id-card
- Farm directory: https://whiskora.pet/th/farm-hub
- Pet knowledge: https://whiskora.pet/th/pet-knowledge
- Pet tools: https://whiskora.pet/th/pet-tools
- Partner program: https://whiskora.pet/th/partner

Preferred short summary:
Whiskora helps pet owners create a free Pet ID with a QR Profile, manage health records and documents, and discover registered pet farms in one platform.
